title: Nassau / R.R. Co.
notes: Atwood-Coffee notes that these tokens seem to have been impregnated with mica.

title: Brooklyn Cross Town R.R. / Pass
notes: All letters incuse. Brooklyn Crosstown Railroad was chartered in 1872 and leased its property in August 1889 to the Brooklyn City Railroad.

sources.title: Atwood-Coffee Catalogue
sources.note: Brooklyn 629 section gives Brooklyn Crosstown Railroad history and references NY997A.

title: Brooklyn Bus Corporation / Transfer Token
notes: Gm-plated. Vars. 2. Brooklyn Bus Corporation was incorporated in 1925 and operated buses in Brooklyn and Queens, including service across the Manhattan Bridge into Manhattan. Transfer token use was instituted in 1929.

sources.title: Atwood-Coffee Catalogue
sources.note: Brooklyn 629 section states 5,000 struck 5/38 and provides Brooklyn Bus Corporation context.

title: Brooklyn and Queens Transit Corporation / Transfer Token
obv: BROOKLYN AND QUEENS TRANSIT CORPORATION / TRANSFER TOKEN
notes: Vars. 4. Brooklyn & Queens Transit Corporation was incorporated in 1929 as a consolidation of earlier companies.

sources.title: Atwood-Coffee Catalogue
sources.note: Brooklyn 629 section states 45,000 struck in 10 orders from 12/29 to 1939.

title: Brooklyn and Queens Transit Corporation / Half Fare Token
obv: BROOKLYN AND QUEENS TRANSIT CORPORATION / HALF FARE TOKEN
rev: Issued in Exchange for Three Cents
notes: Brooklyn & Queens Transit Corp. became part of New York City Transit System in 1940.

title: New York City Transit System B.M.T. Div. / Transfer Token
obv: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT SYSTEM B.M.T. DIV. / TRANSFER TOKEN
notes: Vars. 5. In 1940 the New York City Transit System was organized and took over the Brooklyn-Manhattan Transit Corp., which became a division of NYCTS, the B.M.T. Division.

sources.title: Atwood-Coffee Catalogue
sources.note: Brooklyn 629 section states 75,000 struck total in 5 orders from 9/40 to 1947.

title: New York City Transit System B.M.T. Div. / Transfer Token
obv: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT SYSTEM B.M.T. DIV. / TRANSFER TOKEN

title: New York City Transit System B.M.T. Div. / Transfer Token
obv: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT SYSTEM B.M.T. DIV. / TRANSFER TOKEN

title: New York City Transit System BMT Div. / Half Fare Token
obv: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT SYSTEM BMT DIV. / HALF FARE TOKEN
rev: Issued in Exchange for Three Cents
notes: In 1940 the New York City Transit System was organized and took over the Brooklyn-Manhattan Transit Corp., which became a division of NYCTS, the B.M.T. Division.

sources.title: Atwood-Coffee Catalogue
sources.note: Brooklyn 629 section states 25,000 struck total in 4 orders beginning 7/41.

title: New York City Transit System B.M.T. Division Transfer Token
obv: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT SYSTEM B.M.T. / DIVISION TRANSFER TOKEN

title: New York City Transfer System B.M.T. Division Transfer Token
obv: NEW YORK CITY TRANSFER SYSTEM B.M.T. / DIVISION TRANSFER TOKEN
notes: KA with TRANSFER SYSTEM was an error, and never used.

title: R.T. Corp. One Way Fare
notes: Vars. 2. This token became obsolete in early summer 1977. It was used on a boat operated by Rockaway Transit Corporation crossing Sheepshead Bay.
usage: Good for the return portion of a round-trip fare on the Rockaway Transit Corporation boat crossing Sheepshead Bay.

sources.title: Atwood-Coffee Catalogue
sources.note: Brooklyn 629 section states 11,000 struck total in 4 orders from 6/14/49 to 6/10/68 and describes boat usage.
